channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: Dramatic Video Shows Car Exploding Near Iconic Charging Bull Statue In New York

media:content.media:description: Despite the heavy foot traffic in the area at the time, officials said no injuries were reported.

item.description: Authorities said it took firefighters nearly 90 minutes to fully bring the fire under control.
item.content:encoded: Authorities said it took firefighters nearly 90 minutes to fully bring the fire under control.

item.title: "A Day Apart Feels Like 3 Autumns": Putin, Xi's Bonhomie In Beijing

media:content.media:description: The two countries' ties have deepened since Moscow's 2022 invasion of Ukraine.

item.description: Putin was received by Xi outside Beijing's opulent Great Hall of the People in much the same fashion as Trump last week, complete with chanting children and military fanfare.
item.content:encoded: Putin was received by Xi outside Beijing's opulent Great Hall of the People in much the same fashion as Trump last week, complete with chanting children and military fanfare.

item.title: Will Deliver On Teesta, Padma: Bangladesh Prime Minister Tarique Rahman
item.description: "In Rajshahi, we will build the Padma Barrage on the Padma River... because across the border, they (India) are extracting water in various ways by constructing barrages and dams," Tarique Rahman said at an event in Dhaka.
item.content:encoded: "In Rajshahi, we will build the Padma Barrage on the Padma River... because across the border, they (India) are extracting water in various ways by constructing barrages and dams," Tarique Rahman said at an event in Dhaka.

item.title: "Netanyahu Will Do Whatever I Want": Trump Claims 99% Rating In Israel

media:content.media:description: Trump said that he is "no hurry" to reach a peace agreement with Iran

item.description: Citing his exceptionally high approval ratings in the country, US President Donald Trump said, "So maybe after I do this, I'll go to Israel, run for prime minister. I had a poll this morning. I'm 99%."
item.content:encoded: Citing his exceptionally high approval ratings in the country, US President Donald Trump said, "So maybe after I do this, I'll go to Israel, run for prime minister. I had a poll this morning. I'm 99%."

item.title: Death Penalty For Killer Of Pak TikTok Influencer Sana Yousuf

media:content.media:description: Speaking after the verdict, Yousuf's family told journalists that justice had been served.

item.description: Islamabad Judge Muhammad Afzal Majoka announced the conviction and verdict for Umar Hayat, who was arrested in June after the killing of 17-year-old Sana Yousuf.
item.content:encoded: Islamabad Judge Muhammad Afzal Majoka announced the conviction and verdict for Umar Hayat, who was arrested in June after the killing of 17-year-old Sana Yousuf.

item.title: Barred From Hajj, Gazans To Mark Third Eid al-Adha Without Animal Sacrifice

media:content.media:description: Eid al-Adha, one of Islam's two main festivals, coincides with the Hajj.

item.description: Gazans will mark Eid al-Adha on May 27 without sacrificial animals for a third straight year due to Israeli restrictions, Gaza's agriculture ministry said.
item.content:encoded: Gazans will mark Eid al-Adha on May 27 without sacrificial animals for a third straight year due to Israeli restrictions, Gaza's agriculture ministry said.

item.title: "Violates Dignity": Meloni Rips Into Israel Over Gaza Protesters Video

media:content.media:description: The video posted by Ben Gvir showed activists kneeling with their hands tied behind their backs.

item.description: Meloni called for the immediate release of any detained Italian citizens and demanded an apology from Israel.
item.content:encoded: Meloni called for the immediate release of any detained Italian citizens and demanded an apology from Israel.

item.title: Video: Chinese-Made JF-17 Fighter Jet Crashes In Pakistan, Pilots Eject Safely

media:content.media:description: Videos circulating online showed the fighter jet moments before the crash

item.description: According to reports, the aircraft went down after suffering a suspected technical malfunction. Both pilots managed to eject before the crash, though they reportedly sustained serious injuries. No civilian casualties were reported.
item.content:encoded: According to reports, the aircraft went down after suffering a suspected technical malfunction. Both pilots managed to eject before the crash, though they reportedly sustained serious injuries. No civilian casualties were reported.

item.title: India, Italy Elevate Ties, Eye Stronger Trade And Tech Partnership

media:content.media:description: The two countries have set a target of annual bilateral trade of Euro 20 billion by 2029.

item.description: PM Modi, who landed in Rome on Tuesday night on the final leg of his five-nation tour, was accorded a ceremonial military honour when he arrived for talks with Meloni.
item.content:encoded: PM Modi, who landed in Rome on Tuesday night on the final leg of his five-nation tour, was accorded a ceremonial military honour when he arrived for talks with Meloni.

item.title: F-15s, F-35, MQ-9 Reaper Drones: US Report Says 42 Aircraft Lost In Iran War

media:content.media:description: The US Department of Defence has not published a comprehensive assessment of combat losses so far.

item.description: The CRS, which provides policy and legal analysis to the US Congress and committees, compiled the losses by perusing news reports and statements by the Department of Defence and the US Central Command (CENTCOM).
item.content:encoded: The CRS, which provides policy and legal analysis to the US Congress and committees, compiled the losses by perusing news reports and statements by the Department of Defence and the US Central Command (CENTCOM).

item.title: "Al Instrument For Inclusive Development": PM Modi, Meloni In Joint Article

media:content.media:description: This is the first bilateral visit by an Indian Prime Minister to Italy in 26 years

item.description: The leaders said the two countries "aim to create an open, trustworthy and equitable digital space in which every nation can shape and benefit from Al".
item.content:encoded: The leaders said the two countries "aim to create an open, trustworthy and equitable digital space in which every nation can shape and benefit from Al".

item.title: Reel Of The Day: PM's Special 'Melody' Gift To Meloni And A Viral Moment

media:content.media:description: Sharing the video, Meloni wrote, "Thank you for the gift".

item.description: Internet users often use the "Melodi" hashtag to describe the friendly equation between the two leaders.
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1101754/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>Internet users often use the "Melodi" hashtag to describe the friendly equation between the two leaders.

item.title: US Government To Drop Tax Claims Against Trump After Lawsuit Settlement

media:content.media:description: Trump said the fund is dedicated to "reimbursing people who were horribly treated".

item.description: The move comes after the Trump administration announced Monday, as part of the lawsuit settlement, the creation of a nearly $1.8 billion fund to compensate allies of the Republican president.
item.content:encoded: The move comes after the Trump administration announced Monday, as part of the lawsuit settlement, the creation of a nearly $1.8 billion fund to compensate allies of the Republican president.

item.title: Republican Leader Who Stood Up To Trump Defeated In Kentucky Primary

media:content.media:description: Massie's loss came after months of attacks from Trump

item.description: Massie has angered Trump by opposing US military action in Iran and Venezuela, criticising aid to Israel, resisting parts of the president's agenda and helping push for the release of files related to multimillionaire sex offender Jeffrey Epstein.
item.content:encoded: Massie has angered Trump by opposing US military action in Iran and Venezuela, criticising aid to Israel, resisting parts of the president's agenda and helping push for the release of files related to multimillionaire sex offender Jeffrey Epstein.

item.title: Dramatic Video Shows Visitors Evacuating 245-Foot Roller Coaster In Texas After Power Outage

media:content.media:description: The interruption was reportedly caused by a technical issue.

item.description: The footage quickly went viral, with many viewers saying they couldn't imagine walking down from that height.
item.content:encoded: The footage quickly went viral, with many viewers saying they couldn't imagine walking down from that height.

item.title: This 1950s Mistake Still Makes Millions Of Japanese People Sick

media:content.media:description: Japan is gripped by mass allergies.

item.description: A post-war forestry policy introduced in 1950s Japan is now being blamed for the country's widespread hay fever crisis.
item.content:encoded: A post-war forestry policy introduced in 1950s Japan is now being blamed for the country's widespread hay fever crisis.

item.title: New Twist In JPMorgan Case: Lorna Hajdini Files Countersuit Against Ex-Banker

media:content.media:description: Hajdini countersues Rana for defamation after sexual misconduct allegations damage her reputation.

item.description: JPMorgan Chase executive Lorna Hajdini files defamation suit against former banker, alleging fabricated misconduct claims.
item.content:encoded: JPMorgan Chase executive Lorna Hajdini files defamation suit against former banker, alleging fabricated misconduct claims.

item.title: Meta Tracked "Really Smart" Staff To Train AI Before Layoffs, Hints Viral Clip

media:content.media:description: The clip appears to feature Mark Zuckerberg defending the use of employee-monitoring software

item.description: A purported leaked audio clip of Mark Zuckerberg has reignited fears that Meta employees may be unknowingly training the AI systems poised to replace them.
item.content:encoded: A purported leaked audio clip of Mark Zuckerberg has reignited fears that Meta employees may be unknowingly training the AI systems poised to replace them.

item.title: Google's AI Boss Hints Bots May Surpass Human Intelligence Soon

media:content.media:description: The future sci-fi movies warned us about may have just moved closer

item.description: Google DeepMind CEO Demis Hassabis says Superhuman AI is close
item.content:encoded: Google DeepMind CEO Demis Hassabis says Superhuman AI is close

item.title: US Air Force Warns AI-Powered Robot Fighters Could Surpass Human Pilots

media:content.media:description: Pentagon sees autonomous combat aircraft as a critical part of future warfare.

item.description: A senior US Air Force official has warned that AI-powered autonomous fighter aircraft could eventually outperform human pilots, highlighting the Pentagon's accelerating push toward drone warfare and artificial intelligence-driven combat systems.
item.content:encoded: A senior US Air Force official has warned that AI-powered autonomous fighter aircraft could eventually outperform human pilots, highlighting the Pentagon's accelerating push toward drone warfare and artificial intelligence-driven combat systems.
